commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu-local parsing of interactive-card JSON strings from `message`/`text` for `send` and `thread-reply`, normalizes supported card shapes, routes detected cards through the existing card sender, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. The linked issue supplies an exact `message(action=send)` payload, later comments confirm OpenClaw 2026.4.25 behavior, and current main routes plain Feishu `message` text to `msgType: "post"` unless a structured presentation card already exists.
